301.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever eats with his left hand eats with Shaytan, and whoever drinks with his left hand drinks with Shaytan.'
301.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang makan dengan tangan kirinya, ia makan bersama Setan, dan barangsiapa yang minum dengan tangan kirinya, ia minum bersama Setan.'

302.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she recalled something the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had told her: 'O Aisha, whoever gives you a gift without you asking for it, accept it — it is provision that Allah has offered to you.'
302.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengingat sesuatu yang Rasulullah ﷺ telah katakan kepadanya: 'Wahai Aisyah, siapapun yang memberimu hadiah tanpa kamu memintanya, terimalah — itu adalah rezeki yang Allah tawarkan kepadamu.'

303.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as he was dying. Beside him was a bowl of water. He would dip his hand into it, wipe his face with it, and say: "O Allah, help me through the agonies of death."'
303.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ saat beliau menjelang wafat. Di sampingnya ada sebuah mangkuk berisi air. Beliau mencelupkan tangannya ke dalamnya, mengusap wajahnya dengan air itu, dan berdoa: "Ya Allah, bantulah aku melewati kepedihan sakaratul maut."'

304.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away while leaning between my throat and my chin. After seeing the severity of death that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ endured, I will never again dislike the difficulty of death for anyone.'
304.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat sementara bersandar antara tenggorokan dan daguku. Setelah melihat beratnya kematian yang dialami Rasulullah ﷺ, aku tidak akan pernah lagi membenci kesulitan kematian bagi siapapun.'

305.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Fatima laughed, and I asked her: "What did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ whisper to you that made you cry, then whisper again that made you laugh?" She said: "He whispered to me about his death and I cried, then he whispered to me that I would be the first of his family to follow him, and I laughed."'
305.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Fatimah tertawa, dan aku bertanya kepadanya: "Apa yang Rasulullah ﷺ bisikkan kepadamu yang membuatmu menangis, lalu berbisik lagi yang membuatmu tertawa?" Ia berkata: "Beliau membisikkan tentang kematiannya dan aku menangis, kemudian beliau membisikkan bahwa aku akan menjadi yang pertama dari keluarganya yang mengikutinya, dan aku tertawa."'

306.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'In the dates of al-'Aliya there is a cure' — or he said 'an antidote' — 'when eaten first thing in the morning on an empty stomach.'
306.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dalam kurma al-Aliyah terdapat obat' — atau beliau berkata 'penawar' — 'ketika dimakan pertama kali di pagi hari dalam keadaan perut kosong.'

307.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say to his wives: 'Your situation is what concerns me most after I am gone. Only those with true patience will be patient with you.'
307.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berkata kepada istri-istrinya: 'Kondisi kalian adalah yang paling aku khawatirkan setelah aku pergi. Hanya orang-orang yang benar-benar sabar yang akan bersabar dengan kalian.'

308.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, whenever he sat in a gathering or prayed, would say words. She asked him about them, and he said: 'If he spoke good, they would be a seal upon it until the Day of Resurrection. If he spoke otherwise, they would be an expiation: Glory be to You and with Your praise; there is no god but You; I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You.'
308.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setiap kali duduk dalam suatu majelis atau shalat, mengucapkan beberapa kata. Ia menanyakannya, dan beliau berkata: 'Jika ia berbicara kebaikan, kata-kata ini akan menjadi stempel atasnya hingga Hari Kiamat. Jika ia berbicara selain itu, kata-kata ini akan menjadi penghapus: Maha Suci Engkau dan dengan memuji-Mu; tidak ada ilah kecuali Engkau; aku memohon ampunan-Mu dan bertaubat kepada-Mu.'

309.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited to her the verse: "O Prophet, say to your wives: if you desire Allah and His Messenger and the Abode of the Hereafter" — the entire verse. She said: 'I have chosen Allah and His Messenger.' And the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was pleased with that.
309.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membacakan kepadanya ayat: "Wahai Nabi, katakan kepada istri-istrimu: jika kalian menginginkan Allah dan Rasul-Nya serta Negeri Akhirat" — seluruh ayat. Ia berkata: 'Aku telah memilih Allah dan Rasul-Nya.' Dan Rasulullah ﷺ merasa senang dengan itu.

310.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to sleep with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a mattress while I was menstruating and had a garment on.'
310.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa tidur bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di atas kasur sementara aku sedang haid dan mengenakan pakaian.'

311.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever catches a prostration of Asr before the sun sets, and of Fajr before the sun rises, has caught the prayer.'
311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang mendapatkan satu sujud dari shalat Ashar sebelum matahari terbenam, dan dari shalat Fajar sebelum matahari terbit, ia telah mendapatkan shalat itu.'

312.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ had performed Umrah for his wives but left me. I said: "O Messenger of Allah, you performed Umrah for your wives and left me." He said to Abd al-Rahman: "Take your sister and let her perform Umrah. Circumambulate with her and walk between al-Safa and al-Marwa, then come back to me before I leave al-Hasba tonight."' She said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stayed in al-Hasba on my account.
312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ telah melakukan Umrah untuk istri-istrinya tetapi meninggalkan aku. Aku berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, engkau melakukan Umrah untuk istri-istrimu dan meninggalkan aku." Beliau berkata kepada Abdurrahman: "Bawalah saudarimu dan biarkan dia melakukan Umrah. Tawaf bersamanya dan berjalan antara al-Shafa dan al-Marwah, lalu kembali kepadaku sebelum aku meninggalkan al-Hasba malam ini."' Ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ tinggal di al-Hasba karena aku.

313.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ called for a black sheep with a black face and black legs to be sacrificed. He said: 'O Aisha, bring me the knife.' Then he said: 'Sharpen it on a stone.' She did so. He then took it and took the sheep, laid it down, and slaughtered it saying: 'In the name of Allah. O Allah, accept from Muhammad and the family of Muhammad and the ummah of Muhammad.'
313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ meminta domba hitam dengan muka hitam dan kaki hitam untuk disembelih. Beliau berkata: 'Wahai Aisyah, bawakanku pisau.' Kemudian beliau berkata: 'Asahlah di batu.' Ia melakukannya. Beliau kemudian mengambilnya dan mengambil domba itu, menidurkannya, dan menyembelihnya sambil berkata: 'Dengan nama Allah. Ya Allah, terimalah dari Muhammad dan keluarga Muhammad dan umat Muhammad.'

314.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the Prophet's ﷺ sacrificial animals. He would then place the garlands on them and mark them, then send them toward the House, and he remained in Medina. Nothing that was lawful for him became unlawful [i.e., he did not enter ihram].'
314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa memintal untaian bunga untuk hewan kurban Nabi ﷺ. Kemudian beliau menggantungkannya pada hewan-hewan itu dan menandainya, lalu mengirimnya ke Ka'bah, dan beliau tetap di Madinah. Tidak ada sesuatu yang halal baginya yang menjadi haram [yakni beliau tidak memasuki keadaan ihram].'

315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ departed from al-Bat'ha on the night of departure in haste.
315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berangkat dari al-Bat'ha pada malam keberangkatan dengan segera.

316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to give one of his daughters in marriage, he would sit near her curtain and say: 'So-and-so has proposed for so-and-so' — naming her and the man. If she stayed silent, he would give her in marriage; and if she disliked it, she would tap the curtain, and if she tapped it, he would not give her in marriage.
316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin menikahkan salah satu putrinya, beliau duduk di dekat tirai ruangannya dan berkata: 'Si fulan melamar si fulanah' — menyebutkan nama gadis itu dan nama pria tersebut. Jika ia diam, beliau menikahkannya; dan jika ia tidak menyukainya, ia mengetuk tirai, dan jika ia mengetuk, beliau tidak menikahkannya.

317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'By the One in Whose hand is my soul, they weep over him and he is being punished in his grave for his sin.'
317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Demi Yang jiwa berada di tangan-Nya, mereka menangisinya sementara ia disiksa di kuburannya karena dosanya.'

318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ told a sneezing man: 'Say: Alhamdulillah.' The people said: 'What should we say to him, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Say to him: Yarhamuk Allah.' He said: 'And what should I say to them, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Say to them: Yahdikum Allah wa yuslihu balakum.'
318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahu seorang pria yang bersin: 'Katakan: Alhamdulillah.' Orang-orang berkata: 'Apa yang harus kami katakan kepadanya, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau berkata: 'Katakan kepadanya: Yarhamukallah.' Ia berkata: 'Dan apa yang harus aku katakan kepada mereka, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Katakan kepada mereka: Yahdikumullahu wa yuslihu balakum.'

319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, should we not join you in jihad?' He said: 'The best and most beautiful jihad for you is an accepted Hajj.' Aisha said: 'I will never abandon the Hajj after hearing this from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, tidakkah kami bergabung denganmu dalam jihad?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jihad terbaik dan terindah bagi kalian adalah haji yang mabrur.' Aisyah berkata: 'Aku tidak akan pernah meninggalkan haji setelah mendengar ini dari Rasulullah ﷺ.'

320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she ordered a funeral bier to be brought past her in the mosque. Some objected, and she said: 'How quickly people talk! The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only performed the funeral prayer over Ibn Bayda in the mosque.'
320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia memerintahkan agar jenazah dibawa melewatinya di masjid. Beberapa orang keberatan, dan ia berkata: 'Betapa cepatnya orang berbicara! Rasulullah ﷺ hanya menshalatkan jenazah Ibnu Bayda di masjid.'

321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she ordered the funeral of Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas to be brought past her, and when she heard criticism of this she said: 'How quickly people talk! By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ only prayed over Suhayl ibn Bayda in the mosque.'
321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia memerintahkan jenazah Sa'd bin Abi Waqqas dibawa melewatinya, dan ketika ia mendengar kritikan tentang ini, ia berkata: 'Betapa cepatnya orang berbicara! Demi Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ hanya menshalatkan jenazah Suhail bin Bayda di masjid.'

322.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was told someone was ill and not eating, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You should use talbina [a broth made from flour] and give it to him to sip. By the One in Whose hand is my soul, it clears the belly of one of you just as you clean your face with water from dirt.'
322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia diberitahu seseorang sakit dan tidak makan, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Gunakanlah talbinah [sup yang dibuat dari tepung] dan berikan kepadanya untuk diminum sedikit-sedikit. Demi Yang jiwa berada di tangan-Nya, ia membersihkan perut seseorang di antara kalian sebagaimana kalian membersihkan wajah dengan air dari kotoran.'

323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'O Aisha, protect yourself from the Fire even with half a date, for it fills the hungry as it fills the satisfied.'
323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Aisyah, lindungi dirimu dari neraka meskipun dengan setengah kurma, karena ia memenuhi orang yang lapar sebagaimana memenuhi orang yang kenyang.'

324.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), Mother of the Believers, that the women who went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to apply perfume before entering ihram, then bathe, and the perfume would remain on them as they sweated and bathed. He did not forbid them from it.
324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa para wanita yang keluar bersama Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memakai wewangian sebelum memasuki ihram, kemudian mandi, dan wewangian tetap ada di tubuh mereka saat berkeringat dan mandi. Beliau tidak melarang mereka darinya.

325.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never saw the face of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ show agitation until he saw clouds. But when those clouds brought rain, that agitation disappeared.'
325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat wajah Rasulullah ﷺ menunjukkan kegelisahan kecuali ketika ia melihat awan. Tetapi ketika awan itu membawa hujan, kegelisahan itu hilang.'

326.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Abu Salama, beware of land disputes, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever wrongfully takes a handspan of land — it will be placed around his neck from seven earths."'
326.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Abu Salamah, berhati-hatilah dari sengketa tanah, karena Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang mengambil sejengkal tanah secara zalim — itu akan dikalungkan di lehernya dari tujuh bumi."'

327.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man was mentioned before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he said: 'What a bad servant of Allah and tribesman he is.' Then the man entered and the Prophet ﷺ engaged him warmly in conversation. Aisha said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ turn fully toward him, until I thought the man had a high standing with him.'
327.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria disebutkan di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau berkata: 'Alangkah buruknya hamba Allah dan anggota suku itu.' Kemudian pria itu masuk dan Nabi ﷺ berbicara kepadanya dengan hangat. Aisyah berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ sepenuhnya menghadap kepadanya, hingga aku mengira pria itu memiliki kedudukan tinggi di sisi beliau.'

328.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If people knew what was in the Isha prayer and the Fajr prayer, they would come to them even if they had to crawl.'
328.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika orang-orang mengetahui apa yang ada dalam shalat Isya dan shalat Fajar, mereka pasti datang kepadanya meskipun harus merangkak.'

329.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade making nabidh in al-dubba, al-hantam, and al-muzaffat [types of vessels used for fermentation].'
329.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang membuat nabidh dalam al-dubba, al-hantam, dan al-muzaffat [jenis-jenis wadah yang digunakan untuk fermentasi].'

330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the fasting of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She said: 'He used to fast in Sha'ban and seek out Mondays and Thursdays.'
330.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang puasa Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Beliau biasa berpuasa di bulan Sya'ban dan mencari hari Senin dan Kamis.'

331.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to seek out fasting in Sha'ban and on Mondays and Thursdays.
331.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencari kesempatan untuk berpuasa di bulan Sya'ban dan pada hari Senin dan Kamis.

332.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Those who make these images will be punished on the Day of Resurrection, and it will be said to them: "Give life to what you created."'
332.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mereka yang membuat gambar-gambar ini akan disiksa pada Hari Kiamat, dan akan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Hidupkanlah apa yang telah kalian ciptakan."'

333.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that whenever a member of her family died, she would call for a pot of talbina to be cooked. Then she would call for a meat dish with bread to be made, and pour the talbina over it. Then she would say: 'Eat from it, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Talbina comforts the heart of the sick person and removes some of the grief."'
333.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa setiap kali seseorang dari keluarganya meninggal, ia meminta periuk talbinah dimasak. Kemudian ia meminta hidangan daging dengan roti dibuat, dan menuangkan talbinah di atasnya. Kemudian ia berkata: 'Makanlah darinya, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Talbinah menenangkan hati orang yang sakit dan menghilangkan sebagian kesedihan."'

334.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during his final illness, the Prophet ﷺ said: 'May Allah curse the Jews and Christians, for they took the graves of their prophets as places of worship.' She said: 'Were it not for that, his grave would have been made visible, but it was feared it would be taken as a place of worship.'
334.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dalam sakit terakhirnya, Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah melaknat orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani, karena mereka menjadikan kuburan nabi-nabi mereka sebagai tempat ibadah.' Ia berkata: 'Jika bukan karena itu, kuburan beliau akan dibuat terlihat, tetapi dikhawatirkan akan dijadikan tempat ibadah.'

335.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man purchased a slave, used him, and then found a defect in him and returned him. The seller said: 'What about the slave's earnings?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'The profit comes with the guarantee [i.e., whoever takes the responsibility takes the profit].'
335.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria membeli seorang budak, menggunakannya, kemudian menemukan cacat padanya dan mengembalikannya. Penjual berkata: 'Bagaimana dengan penghasilan budak?' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Keuntungan mengikuti jaminan [yakni siapa yang menanggung tanggung jawab mendapat keuntungan].'

336.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Cut off the hand for a quarter of a dinar and above, and do not cut off for what is less than that.' At that time a quarter dinar was equivalent to three dirhams, and a dinar was twelve dirhams.
336.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Potonglah tangan untuk seperempat dinar ke atas, dan jangan potong untuk yang kurang dari itu.' Pada waktu itu seperempat dinar setara dengan tiga dirham, dan satu dinar adalah dua belas dirham.

337.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr: 'Perform your ablution thoroughly, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Woe to the heels from the Fire."'
337.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakr: 'Sempurnakanlah wudhumu, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Celakalah tumit-tumit dari neraka."'

338.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray two rak'ahs between the adhan and the iqama of the Fajr prayer.
338.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat antara adzan dan iqamah shalat Fajar.

339.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was told the month had been sighted with twenty-nine days. She said: 'What surprises you about that? I fasted with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ twenty-nine days more often than I fasted thirty.'
339.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia diberitahu bulan telah terlihat dengan dua puluh sembilan hari. Ia berkata: 'Apa yang membuatmu heran tentang itu? Aku berpuasa bersama Rasulullah ﷺ selama dua puluh sembilan hari lebih sering daripada tiga puluh.'

340.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Prophet ﷺ about when his ummah would perish. He said: 'Death will take them swiftly while they long for more life.' She asked: 'What will people be like after that?' He said: 'Like locusts — the strong devouring the weak — until the Hour overtakes them.'
340.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang kapan umatnya akan binasa. Beliau bersabda: 'Kematian akan mengambil mereka dengan cepat sementara mereka merindukan lebih banyak kehidupan.' Ia bertanya: 'Bagaimana kondisi orang-orang setelah itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Seperti belalang — yang kuat memangsa yang lemah — hingga Hari Kiamat datang menimpa mereka.'

341.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a Jewish woman said to her: 'May Allah protect you from the punishment of the grave.' Aisha asked the Prophet ﷺ about it. Initially he said: 'The Jews have lied. There is no punishment before the Day of Judgment.' Then some time later he came out and said loudly: 'O people, seek refuge in Allah from the trials that have drawn near.'
341.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita Yahudi berkata kepadanya: 'Semoga Allah melindungimu dari azab kubur.' Aisyah menanyakan hal ini kepada Nabi ﷺ. Awalnya beliau berkata: 'Orang-orang Yahudi berdusta. Tidak ada azab sebelum Hari Kiamat.' Kemudian beberapa waktu kemudian beliau keluar dan berseru dengan keras: 'Wahai manusia, berlindunglah kepada Allah dari cobaan-cobaan yang telah mendekat.'

342.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would bring his head in to me while he was in the mosque, and I would comb it. He would not enter the house except for a need' — referring to when he was in i'tikaf.
342.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memasukkan kepalanya ke arahku sementara beliau di masjid, dan aku menyisir rambutnya. Beliau tidak masuk ke rumah kecuali untuk suatu keperluan' — maksudnya ketika beliau beri'tikaf.

343.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding Barira: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Buy her and free her, for loyalty belongs to the one who frees." Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stood and said: "What is wrong with people who stipulate conditions that are not in the Book of Allah? Whoever stipulates a condition that is not in the Book of Allah, it is not binding, even if he stipulates it a hundred times."'
343.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai Barirah: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Belilah dia dan merdekakanlah, karena perwalian milik orang yang memerdekakan." Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ berdiri dan bersabda: "Ada apa dengan orang-orang yang menetapkan syarat-syarat yang tidak ada dalam Kitab Allah? Barangsiapa yang menetapkan syarat yang tidak ada dalam Kitab Allah, itu tidak mengikat, meskipun ia menetapkannya seratus kali."'

344.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman came to the Prophet ﷺ and said she was experiencing prolonged bleeding. He said: 'It is only a vein. Bathe and pray.' So she bathed before every prayer. Ibn Shihab said: He did not command her to bathe before every prayer — she did that herself.
344.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata bahwa ia mengalami perdarahan yang berkepanjangan. Beliau berkata: 'Itu hanyalah urat. Mandilah dan shalatlah.' Maka ia mandi sebelum setiap shalat. Ibnu Syihab berkata: Beliau tidak memerintahkannya untuk mandi sebelum setiap shalat — ia melakukannya sendiri.

345.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would send sacrificial animals from Medina. I would twist the garlands for his sacrificial animals, then he would garland them and not avoid anything that was lawful for a non-muhrim.'
345.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengirim hewan kurban dari Madinah. Aku memintal untaian untuk hewan kurbannya, kemudian beliau mengalungkannya dan tidak menjauhi apapun yang halal bagi orang yang tidak berihram.'

346.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said about Safiyya: 'Has she detained us?' She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, she has already performed the tawaf and then menstruated after it.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Then let her depart.'
346.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata tentang Shafiyyah: 'Apakah ia menahan kita?' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ia telah melakukan tawaf dan kemudian haid setelahnya.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Maka biarkanlah ia berangkat.'

347.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered cheerfully with his face beaming, and said: 'Did you not see that Mujazziz just looked at Zayd ibn Haritha and Usama and said: "Some of these feet are from the same [family]"?'
347.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk dengan gembira dan wajah berseri-seri, dan bersabda: 'Tidakkah kamu melihat bahwa Mujazziz baru saja melihat Zayd bin Haritsah dan Usamah dan berkata: "Sebagian dari kaki-kaki ini berasal dari [keluarga] yang sama"?'

348.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'One who flees from the plague is like one who flees from battle.'
348.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang lari dari wabah tha'un adalah seperti orang yang lari dari pertempuran.'

349.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to strive harder in the [last] ten nights than he did at any other time.'
349.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersungguh-sungguh lebih keras dalam sepuluh [malam terakhir] daripada waktu lainnya.'

350.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The most blessed of marriages is the one that is least burdensome.'
350.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pernikahan yang paling berkah adalah yang paling ringan bebannya.'
